:root {
    /* Font settings */
    --title-font: "Relative" !important;
    --title-font-weight: 400;
    --title-font-style: normal;
    --title-letter-spacing: -0.05em;
    --title-font-size: 22px;
    --title-font--base-size: 36;
    --title-line-height: 1.1;
    --title-text-transform: unset;
    /* --body-font: "serif"; */
    
    --body-font-weight: 400;
    
    --body-bold-font-weight: 700;
    --body-font-style: normal;
    --body-letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    /* --body-font-size: 20px; */
    /* --body-font-base-size: 16; */
    --body-line-height: 1.2;
    /* --header-font: "Assistant"; */
    --header-font-size: 14px;
        --header-text-uppercase: uppercase;

    /* Color settings as RGB values for use with rgb() and rgba() */
    --color-page-background: 255, 255, 255;
    --color-text: 0, 0, 0;
    --color-light-text: 17, 63, 103;
    --color-sale: 0, 0, 0;
    --color-discount: 17, 63, 103;
    --color-entry-line: 17, 63, 103;
    --color-card-background: 242, 242, 242;
    --color-card-text: 0, 0, 0;
    /* Button colors moved to dedicated Buttons section below */
    --color-discount-tag-background: 17, 63, 103;
    --color-discount-tag-text: 255, 255, 255;
    --color-scheme-1-bg: 0, 0, 0;
    --color-scheme-1-text: 255, 255, 255;
    --color-scheme-2-bg: 247, 251, 66;
    --color-scheme-2-text: 0, 0, 0;
    --color-scheme-3-bg: 255, 255, 255;
    --color-scheme-3-text: 0, 0, 0;
    --color-scheme-4-bg: 230, 230, 230;
    --color-scheme-4-text: 0, 0, 0;
    --color-scheme-1-gradient: #000000;
    --color-scheme-2-gradient: #f7fb42;
    --color-scheme-3-gradient: #ffffff;
    --color-scheme-4-gradient: #e6e6e6;

    /* Button styles from new Buttons section */
    --button-radius: 5px;
    --button-border-radius: 5px;
    --button-primary-bg: 0, 0, 0;
    --button-primary-bg-hover: 0, 0, 0;
    --button-primary-text: 255, 255, 255;
    --button-secondary-bg: 247, 251, 66;
    --button-secondary-bg-hover: 0, 0, 0;
    --button-secondary-text: 0, 0, 0;
    --button-secondary-border: 255, 255, 255;

    /* Card styles */
    --card-radius: 0px;
    --card-border-radius: 0px;
    --card-shadow: 10%;

    /* Input fields */
    --input-border-thickness: 2px;
    --input-border-opacity: 15%;
    --input-border-opacity-decimal: 0.15;
    --input-border-radius: 4px;
    --input-border-radius-outset: 6px;
    --input-shadow-opacity: 0%;
    --input-shadow-offset-x: 0px;
    --input-shadow-offset-y: 4px;
    --input-shadow-blur: 5px;

    /* Legacy color variables for backward compatibility */
    --color-primary: rgb(0, 0, 0);
    --color-secondary: rgb(0, 0, 0);
    --focus-ring-color: rgb(0, 0, 0);
    --focus-border-color: rgb(0, 0, 0);
}

<script>
  (function() {
    var isProduct = Number(sessionStorage.getItem('sl_console')) === 1 || window.__ENV__.APP_ENV === 'product' || window.__ENV__.APP_ENV === 'preview'
    var hasSsrDebug = Number(window.Shopline && Shopline.uri && Shopline.uri.query && Shopline.uri.query.ssr_debug) === 1
    var debugConsoleFnList = ['log']
    var consoleFnNames = Object.keys(console).filter(function(key) {return typeof console[key] === 'function'})
    window.__sl_console__ = consoleFnNames.reduce(function (result, fnName) {
      var hasConsoleFn = debugConsoleFnList.indexOf(fnName) !== -1
      result[fnName] = function () {
        try {
          var args = Array.prototype.slice.apply(arguments)
          var prefix = '[SL_' + fnName.toUpperCase() + ']:'
          if (isProduct) {
            if (hasConsoleFn && hasSsrDebug) {
              return console[fnName].apply(null, [prefix].concat(args))
            } else if (!hasConsoleFn) {
              return console[fnName].apply(null, args)
            }
          } else if (hasConsoleFn) {
            return console[fnName].apply(null, [prefix].concat(args))
          } else {
            return console[fnName].apply(null, args)
          }
        } catch (e) {
          console.error(e)
        }
      }
      return result
    }, {})
  })()
</script>

body .main-search__body.search-filter-con-container .plugin-search-filter-container__main+.facets-layout-drawer {
  column-gap: 40px
}

body .main-search__body.search-filter-con-container,
body .main-collection-container.search-filter-con-container {
  display: grid;

}

body .main-collection-container.search-filter-con-container .plugin-search-filter-container__main+.facets-layout-vertical,
body .main-collection-container.search-filter-con-container .plugin-search-filter-container__main+.facets-layout-horizontal,
body .main-collection-container.search-filter-con-container .plugin-search-filter-container__main+.facets-layout-drawer {

  width: auto;
  vertical-align: top;
  grid-area: content;

body .main-search__body.search-filter-con-container .plugin-search-filter-container__main+.facets-layout-vertical,
body .main-collection-container.search-filter-con-container .plugin-search-filter-container__main+.facets-layout-vertical {

body .main-search__body.search-filter-con-container .plugin-search-filter-container__main+.facets-layout-drawer,

}


.plugin-search-skeleton-content{
  margin-bottom: 30px;
}

.plugin-search-skeleton-item {
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(var(--color-text, '0,0,0'), .05) 25%, rgba(var(--color-text, '0,0,0'), .15) 37%, rgba(var(--color-text, '0,0,0'), .05) 63%);
  background-size: 400% 100%;
  animation-name: plugin-search-skeleton-loading;
  animation-duration: 1.4s;
  animation-timing-function: ease;
  animation-iteration-count: infinite;
  border-radius: 2px;
  height: 14px;
}
.plugin-search-skeleton-item-header{
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  margin-bottom: 18px;
}
.plugin-search-skeleton-item-header-left.plugin-search-skeleton-item {
  width: 48%;
  height: 20px;;
  border-radius: 4px;
}
.plugin-search-skeleton-item-header-right.plugin-search-skeleton-item {
  width: 10px;
  height: 6px;
  border-radius: 6px;
}
.plugin-search-skeleton-item-content{
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  row-gap: 10px;
}

@keyframes plugin-search-skeleton-loading {
  0% {
    background-position: 100% 50%;
  }

  100% {
    background-position: 0 50%;
  }

      background-color: rgb(var(--color-scheme-2-bg)) !important; color: rgb(var(--color-scheme-2-text)) !important;
  background-image: none !important; position: relative; overflow: hidden;">
  <div class="container font-medium text-lg">
    <div class="swiper announcement-swiper" data-autoplay="true" data-duration="5">
      <div class="swiper-wrapper">
        <div class="swiper-slide">
          Free U.S. Shipping on Orders $55+

<header class="site-header bg-white border-b border-gray-200 py-3.5 sm:py-3.5"
        style="">
  
  <style>
    /* Announcement Swiper Styles */
    .announcement-swiper {
      width: 100%;
      height: auto;
      min-height: 23px;
    }
    
    .announcement-swiper .swiper-wrapper {
      align-items: center;
    }
    
    .announcement-swiper .swiper-slide {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      text-align: center;
      width: 100%;
      height: auto;
      position: absolute;
      top: 0;
      left: 0;
    }
    
    .announcement-swiper .swiper-slide:not(.swiper-slide-active) {
      opacity: 0 !important;
      pointer-events: none;
    }
    
    .announcement-swiper .swiper-slide-active {
      opacity: 1 !important;
      position: relative;
    }

    /* CSS Variables for dynamic color switching */
    .site-header {
      --current-header-color: #000000;
    }
    
    /* Apply color to all header elements using the variable */
    .site-header,
    .site-header a,
    .site-header button,
    .site-header nav a,
    .site-header nav > div > a,
    .site-header .group > a,
    .site-header h1 {
      color: var(--current-header-color) !important;
    }

    .site-header a {
        position: relative;
    }

    .site-header nav a::after {
        content: '';
        display: block;
        position: absolute;
        left: 0;
        bottom: 10px;
        width: 100%;
        height: 2px;
        background: black;
        opacity: 0;
        transition: all .3s;
    }

    .site-header nav a:hover::after {
        opacity: 1;
    }

    .site-header nav a.active::after {
        opacity: 1;
    }

    /* Apply stroke only to icon SVGs, not the logo */
    .site-header svg:not(#logo-77) {
      stroke: var(--current-header-color) !important;
    }
    /* Logo placeholder uses fill from currentColor which inherits text color */
    .site-header #logo-77 {
      color: var(--current-header-color) !important;
    }
    
    /* Override variable for transparent state (homepage only, not scrolled) */
    
    /* Text shadow for better readability - only when transparent and not scrolled */
    
    /* Optional backdrop blur - only when transparent and not scrolled */
    
    /* Logo filter transition - only for actual images */
    .site-header img[alt="Untoxicated"] {
      transition: filter 0.3s ease-in-out;
    }
    
    /* Invert logo IMAGE when transparent header - only if logo is selected */
  </style>

  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    // Mobile menu toggle
    const mobileMenuToggle = document.querySelector('.mobile-menu-toggle');
    if (mobileMenuToggle) {
      mobileMenuToggle.addEventListener('click', function() {
        document.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('mobile-menu:open'));
      });
    }
    
    // Search toggle - handle all search buttons
    const searchToggles = document.querySelectorAll('.search-toggle');
    searchToggles.forEach(toggle => {
      toggle.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        document.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('search-overlay:open'));
      });
    });
    
    // Cart toggle - handle all cart buttons
    const cartToggles = document.querySelectorAll('.cart-toggle');
    console.log('[Header] Found cart toggles:', cartToggles.length);
    cartToggles.forEach(toggle => {
      toggle.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        e.stopPropagation();
        console.log('[Header] Cart toggle clicked!');
        // Get cart type from Shopline theme settings
        const cartType = Shopline?.theme?.settings?.cart_type || 'drawer';
        console.log('[Header] Cart type:', cartType, 'OrionCart exists:', !!window.OrionCart);

        if (cartType === 'drawer' && window.OrionCart) {
          console.log('[Header] Calling OrionCart.openDrawer()');
          window.OrionCart.openDrawer();
        } else {
          window.location.href = Shopline?.routes?.cart || '/cart';
        }
      });
    });

    // Initialize Announcement Swiper
    const announcementSwiper = document.querySelector('.announcement-swiper');
    if (announcementSwiper && typeof Swiper !== 'undefined') {
      const autoplay = announcementSwiper.dataset.autoplay === 'true';
      const duration = parseInt(announcementSwiper.dataset.duration || 5) * 1000;
      
      new Swiper('.announcement-swiper', {
        effect: 'fade',
        fadeEffect: {
          crossFade: true
        },
        speed: 800,
        autoplay: autoplay ? {
          delay: duration,
          disableOnInteraction: false,
        } : false,
        loop: true,
        allowTouchMove: false, // Disable swipe gestures for announcement bar
      });
    }
  });
</script>

        <!-- Initialize Swiper -->
        <script>
          document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
            // Wait for Swiper to be available globally
            let currentSwiper = null;

            const initSwiper = () => {
              if (typeof window.Swiper !== 'undefined' && window.SwiperModules) {
                // Destroy existing swiper if it exists
                if (currentSwiper) {
                  try {
                    currentSwiper.destroy(true, true);
                  } catch (e) {
                    console.warn('Error destroying swiper:', e);
                  }
                  currentSwiper = null;
                }

                // Determine which navigation buttons to use based on screen size
                const isMobile = window.innerWidth < 768;
                const nextEl = isMobile ? '.swiper-button-next-custom-mobile' : '.swiper-button-next-custom';
                const prevEl = isMobile ? '.swiper-button-prev-custom-mobile' : '.swiper-button-prev-custom';

                try {
                  currentSwiper = new window.Swiper('.product-swiper', {
                    // Optional parameters
                    loop: true,
                    autoHeight: true,

                    // Touch/swipe settings
                    touchEventsTarget: 'container',
                    simulateTouch: true,
                    allowTouchMove: true,
                    touchRatio: 1,
                    touchAngle: 45,
                    grabCursor: true,
                    preventClicks: false,
                    preventClicksPropagation: false,
                    slideToClickedSlide: false,
                    touchStartPreventDefault: false,
                    touchMoveStopPropagation: false,
                    slidesPerGroup: 1,

                    // Responsive breakpoints
                    breakpoints: {
                      320: {
                        slidesPerView: 1,
                        spaceBetween: 20
                      },
                      640: {
                        slidesPerView: 2,
                        spaceBetween: 30
                      },
                      1024: {
                        slidesPerView: 3,
                        spaceBetween: 40
                      },
                      1280: {
                        slidesPerView: 4,
                        spaceBetween: 40
                      }
                    },

                    // Navigation arrows - using custom buttons
                    navigation: {
                      nextEl: nextEl,
                      prevEl: prevEl,
                    },

                    // Modules
                    modules: [window.SwiperModules.Navigation],
                  });
                } catch (e) {
                  console.error('Error initializing swiper:', e);
                  return;
                }

                // Update navigation on window resize
                let resizeTimeout;
                const handleResize = () => {
                  clearTimeout(resizeTimeout);
                  resizeTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                    const nowMobile = window.innerWidth < 768;
                    if ((isMobile && !nowMobile) || (!isMobile && nowMobile)) {
                      // Screen size category changed, reinitialize
                      initSwiper();
                    }
                  }, 250);
                };

                window.addEventListener('resize', handleResize);
              } else {
                // Retry after a short delay if Swiper isn't loaded yet
                setTimeout(initSwiper, 100);
              }
            };
            
            initSwiper();
          });
        </script>
        
  </div>
</div>


</div>

<script>
  // Auto-scroll to newsletter section after successful submission
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    // Check if there's a success message (meaning form was just submitted)
    const successMessage = document.querySelector('.newsletter-success-message');
    const errorMessage = document.querySelector('.newsletter-error-message');
    const newsletterSection = document.getElementById('newsletter-section');
    
    if ((successMessage || errorMessage) && newsletterSection) {
      // Wait a brief moment for the page to fully render
      setTimeout(function() {
        // Calculate the position to scroll to (accounting for any sticky header)
        const headerHeight = document.querySelector('header')?.offsetHeight || 0;
        const targetPosition = newsletterSection.offsetTop - headerHeight - 20; // 20px padding
        
        // Smooth scroll to the newsletter section
        window.scrollTo({
          top: targetPosition,
          behavior: 'smooth'
        });
        
        // Optional: Add a subtle highlight animation to the success message
        if (successMessage) {
          successMessage.classList.add('animate-pulse');
          // Remove animation after 2 seconds
          setTimeout(() => {
            successMessage.classList.remove('animate-pulse');
          }, 2000);
        }
      }, 100);
    }
  });
</script>
